description: I capture and organize your creative ideas, insights, and strategic thoughts
capabilities: Store and categorize ideas with tags and context
Track idea evolution and refinement over time
Provide idea retrieval based on keywords and themes
Help prioritize and develop promising concepts
examples: Save this idea: 'New feature for mobile app'
Show me ideas related to 'product development'
What ideas have I captured this week?
Connect this idea to my previous thoughts on AI
Help me develop the concept for automated workflows
cta: Share your next idea by mentioning @agent-ideas-agent!
